title: The strange case of Lebanon's 'ceasefire'
snippet: Analysis of Lebanon ceasefire that functions as continued war. 2,618 killed, 8,094 wounded since March 2. IDF maintains 10km 'security zone.' 40+ killed during ceasefire period. Ceasefire extension to May 17 increasingly meaningless as daily attacks continue.
tag_reason: 레바논 '휴전'의 구조적 문제 분석은 5/1 신규 분석 기사
